'''mawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackaroo|smackaroo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackaroo|smackaroo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæweheth|mæweheth]] || [[word:mæwehej|mæwehej]] || [[word:mæwehesh|mæwehesh]] || [[word:mæwehe|mæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawowohoth|mawowohoth]] || [[word:mawowohoj|mawowohoj]] || [[word:mawowohosh|mawowohosh]] || [[word:mawowoho|mawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawohoth|mawohoth]] || [[word:mawohoj|mawohoj]] || [[word:mawohosh|mawohosh]] || [[word:mawoho|mawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawofhoth|mawofhoth]] || [[word:mawofhoj|mawofhoj]] || [[word:mawofhosh|mawofhosh]] || [[word:mawofhof|mawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawohotho|mawohotho]] || [[word:mawohojo|mawohojo]] || [[word:mawohosho|mawohosho]] || [[word:mawohoko|mawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawohoth|mawohoth]] || [[word:mawohoj|mawohoj]] || [[word:mawohosh|mawohosh]] || [[word:mawoho|mawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawohothol|mawohothol]] || [[word:mawohojol|mawohojol]] || [[word:mawohoshol|mawohoshol]] || [[word:mawohokol|mawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawohothotho|mawohothotho]] || [[word:mawohojojo|mawohojojo]] || [[word:mawohoshosho|mawohoshosho]] || [[word:mawohoko|mawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawohothon|mawohothon]] || [[word:mawohojon|mawohojon]] || [[word:mawohoshon|mawohoshon]] || [[word:mawohokon|mawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawohothoro|mawohothoro]] || [[word:mawohojoro|mawohojoro]] || [[word:mawohoshoro|mawohoshoro]] || [[word:mawohokoro|mawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
